mapper.select: SELECT SCRN.GATE_CD ,SCRN.SCREEN_ID ,GETMULTINAME(SCRN.GATE_CD, 'SC', #{ses.langCd}, '', SCRN.SCREEN_ID) AS SCREEN_NM ,SCRN.REG_DATE ,SCRN.REG_USER_ID ,SCRN.MOD_DATE ,SCRN.MOD_USER_ID ,SCRN.DEL_FLAG ,SCRN.USE_FLAG ,SCRN.MODULE_TYPE ,SCRN.SCREEN_URL ,SCRN.DATA_AUTH_FLAG ,SCRN.SCREEN_TYPE ,SCRN.DEVELOPER_CD ,SCRN.GRID_TYPE ,SCRN.SSL_FLAG ,SCRN.EXCEL_OPTION ,MUTM.TMPL_MENU_CD FROM STOCSCRN SCRN LEFT OUTER JOIN STOCMUTM MUTM ON (SCRN.GATE_CD = MUTM.GATE_CD AND SCRN.SCREEN_ID = MUTM.SCREEN_ID AND MUTM.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE SCRN.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND SCRN.SCREEN_ID = #{SCREEN_ID}

SELECT (NOTICE_NUM,'XXX') NOTICE_NUM FROM (SELECT SCRN.GATE_CD ,SCRN.SCREEN_ID ,SCRN.REG_DATE ,SCRN.REG_USER_ID ,SCRN.MOD_DATE ,SCRN.MOD_USER_ID ,SCRN.DEL_FLAG ,SCRN.USE_FLAG ,SCRN.MODULE_TYPE ,SCRN.SCREEN_URL ,SCRN.DATA_AUTH_FLAG ,SCRN.SCREEN_TYPE ,SCRN.DEVELOPER_CD ,SCRN.GRID_TYPE ,SCRN.SSL_FLAG ,SCRN.EXCEL_OPTION ,( SELECT MAX (NOTC.NOTICE_NUM) FROM STOCNOTC NOTC WHERE NOTC.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND SYSDATE >= (((NOTC.START_DATE, SYSDATE), 'YYYYMMDD')) AND SYSDATE <= (((NOTC.END_DATE, SYSDATE), 'YYYYMMDD')) AND NOTC.SCREEN_ID = SCRN.SCREEN_ID AND NOTC.DEL_FLAG = '0') NOTICE_NUM FROM STOCSCRN SCRN WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND SCREEN_ID = ( SELECT screen_id FROM STOCMUTM WHERE gate_cd = #{ses.gateCd} AND tmpl_menu_cd = #{tmpl_menu_cd}
) ) A

SELECT DISTINCT CODD.CODE , CODD.CODE_DESC , CODD.TEXT1 AS IMAGE_URL , AUTH.MAIN_MODULE_TYPE
, CODD.TEXT2 -- 고객사
, CODD.TEXT3 -- 공급사
, CODD.TEXT4 -- 운영사
, CODD.SORT_SQ
FROM STOCCODD CODD JOIN (SELECT MUGR.GATE_CD , MUGR.MODULE_TYPE , AUPF.MAIN_MODULE_TYPE ,(CASE WHEN ((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCMJUA WHERE GATE_CD = MUTM.GATE_CD AND SCREEN_ID = MUTM.SCREEN_ID AND ((DATA_TYPE = 'U' AND DATA_CD = #{ses.userId} ) OR (DATA_TYPE = 'J' AND DATA_CD IN (SELECT CTRL_CD FROM STOCBACP WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND CTRL_USER_ID = #{ses.userId} AND USE_FLAG = '1' AND DEL_FLAG = '0') )) AND DEL_FLAG = '0' ) > 0 ) OR (#{ses.superUserFlag}, '0') = '1' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS screenAccessAuth FROM STOCMUGR MUGR JOIN STOCAUMP AUMP ON (AUMP.GATE_CD = MUGR.GATE_CD AND AUMP.MENU_GROUP_CD = MUGR.MENU_GROUP_CD AND AUMP.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCAUPF AUPF ON (AUPF.GATE_CD = AUMP.GATE_CD AND AUPF.AUTH_CD = AUMP.AUTH_CD AND AUPF.AUTH_CD = #{AUTH_CD} AND AUPF.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCMUTM MUTM ON (MUTM.GATE_CD = MUGR.GATE_CD AND MUTM.TMPL_MENU_GROUP_CD = MUGR.TMPL_MENU_GROUP_CD AND MUTM.MODULE_TYPE = MUGR.MODULE_TYPE AND MUTM.USE_FLAG = '1' AND MUTM.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCMUMS MUMS ON (MUMS.GATE_CD = MUTM.GATE_CD AND MUMS.TMPL_MENU_CD = MUTM.TMPL_MENU_CD AND MUMS.USE_FLAG = '1' AND MUMS.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE MUGR.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND MUGR.DEL_FLAG = '0') AUTH ON (CODD.GATE_CD = AUTH.GATE_CD AND CODD.CODE = AUTH.MODULE_TYPE AND AUTH.screenAccessAuth = 'Y') WHERE CODD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND CODD.LANG_CD = #{ses.langCd} AND CODD.CODE_TYPE = 'M009' AND CODD.DEL_FLAG = '0'
ORDER BY CODD.TEXT2 -- 고객사
ORDER BY CODD.TEXT3 -- 공급사
ORDER BY CODD.TEXT4 -- 운영사
ORDER BY CODD.SORT_SQ

SELECT CODE , CODE_DESC , TEXT1 AS IMAGE_URL , MAIN_MODULE_TYPE FROM STOCCODD CODD JOIN (SELECT MUGR.GATE_CD , MUGR.MODULE_TYPE , AUPF.MAIN_MODULE_TYPE FROM STOCMUGR MUGR JOIN STOCAUMP AUMP ON (MUGR.GATE_CD = AUMP.GATE_CD AND MUGR.MENU_GROUP_CD = AUMP.MENU_GROUP_CD AND AUMP.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCAUPF AUPF ON (AUMP.GATE_CD = AUPF.GATE_CD AND AUMP.AUTH_CD = AUPF.AUTH_CD AND AUPF.AUTH_CD = #{AUTH_CD} AND AUPF.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE MUGR.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND MUGR.DEL_FLAG = '0') AUTH ON (CODD.GATE_CD = AUTH.GATE_CD AND CODD.CODE = AUTH.MODULE_TYPE) WHERE CODD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND CODD.LANG_CD = #{ses.langCd} AND CODD.CODE_TYPE = 'M009' AND CODD.DEL_FLAG = '0'
ORDER BY TEXT2 -- 고객사
ORDER BY TEXT3 -- 공급사
ORDER BY TEXT4 -- 운영사
ORDER BY SORT_SQ
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STOCSCBM ( GATE_CD, TMPL_MENU_CD, USER_ID, REG_DATE, REG_USER_ID, MOD_DATE, MOD_USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{ses.gateCd}, #{templateMenuCd}, #{ses.userId} , SYSDATE, #{ses.userId} , SYSDATE, #{ses.userId} )
